positive: A retro vaporwave scene of a chrome sports car driving towards a sunset over a grid-patterned ocean. Palm trees silhouette against a vibrant pink and teal gradient sky. 1980s aesthetic, grainy film texture, synthwave art, low-poly rendering, highly stylized, vaporwave poster.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realistic people, natural light, modern
